about.title:
World-Class Manufacturing
Expertise in Vietnam
about.desc: PS Aunics VINA is a subsidiary of PS Aunics (Penta Stone Group), specializing in MEMS Microphone packaging and OEM/ODM electronics manufacturing at Gia Van Industrial Complex, Ninh Binh. We are the trusted manufacturing partner of Samsung, Naver, and leading global brands.

business.title: Business Areas
business.desc: Specialized manufacturing solutions for global partners
business.mems_desc: MEMS Microphone back-end packaging and assembly for Samsung Electronics and global brands
business.auto_desc: PCBA, dashcam and automotive electronics manufacturing to IATF 16949 standards
business.oem_desc: Contract manufacturing for AI speakers (Naver), wearables, LTE/5G modules and consumer electronics
business.lte_desc: 5G and LTE communication module manufacturing for major Korean and global telecom operators

products_section.title: Products & Solutions
products_section.desc: Precision manufacturing for the world's leading electronics brands
products_section.mems_desc: High-performance analog/digital MEMS microphones exclusively supplied to Samsung Electronics
products_section.sensor_desc: Smart watch and premium wearable device assembly for global brands
products_section.dashcam_desc: Manufacturing of AI smart speakers integrated with Naver's Clova voice assistant
products_section.lte_desc: LTE/5G modules for SKT, KT, LG U+ networks and industrial IoT applications
products_section.ecm_desc: ECM microphone manufacturing with 20+ years of expertise for automotive and consumer applications
products_section.ems_desc: Full-service contract electronics manufacturing from components to finished products for global Tier-1 partners

global.title: Global Network
global.desc: 4 manufacturing locations across 3 countries — serving customers worldwide

footer.addr: Lot CN4, Gia Van Industrial Complex, Gia Vien District, Ninh Binh Province, Vietnam
